systemVAMD64.name: System V AMD64
systemVAMD64.stackAlignment: Before `call`, the stack must be aligned so the callee sees 16-byte alignment after the return address is pushed.
notes: Used by Linux, macOS, BSD, and many Unix-like x86-64 targets.

linuxSyscallX86_64.name: Linux x86-64 syscall
notes: Unlike System V function calls, syscall argument 4 is `r10`, not `rcx`.
